value.found_quote: Analytics dashboard | Per-user metrics, contribution tracking, leaderboard | Anthropic only | [Analytics](/en/analytics)
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists the "Analytics dashboard" capability in a table under "Set up usage visibility," describing it as providing "Per-user metrics, contribution tracking, leaderboard" with availability listed as "Anthropic only." This directly matches the claim's description of per-user metrics, contribution tracking, a leaderboard, and availability limited to Anthropic plans. The page presents this as a current, active feature (no preview or deprecated language used).
